title: European stocks close on firm note
description: European stocks closed higher on Monday, and several markets climbed to multi-month highs amid rising optimism about Iran and the United States reaching a peace deal that could result in the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz. A sharp fall in crude oil prices helped ease concerns about inflation and growth.

title: Equinor And Aker BP Reshape North Sea Assets To Refine Returns
description:
Equinor (OB:EQNR) and Aker BP have entered into asset swaps and collaboration agreements across several fields on the Norwegian Continental Shelf.
The transactions involve interests in areas such as Ringvei Vest, Yggdrasil, and Wisting, one of the largest undeveloped oil discoveries on the shelf.
The parties aim to align ownership and coordinate development plans across Norwegian and related UK assets.

title: Assessing Continental (XTRA:CON) Valuation After Thailand Tire Plant Expansion And Capacity Increase
description:
